basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Project Assistant-I Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (NIPB), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Project Assistant-I post with B.Sc. qualification under a project funded by Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change. Last date for Walk-in Interview is 20 July 2026.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Upper age limit is 50 years
qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc./Graduation passed in Biological Science / Biology related subjects or any relevant subject

salary_details.details: Fixed Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 25,000/- (No other allowances)

selection_process: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be considered. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: This is a Walk-in Interview recruitment. No online application is required.
Download and fill the Application Form strictly in the prescribed format (available in the notification – all fields mandatory).
Prepare 2 copies of the filled application form.
Bring 2 self-attested photocopies of all required documents.
Carry all Original Documents for verification on the date of interview.
Report at LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi – 110012 by 09:30 A.M. on 20.07.2026.
Candidates must be present at least 60 minutes before the interview time.
List of Documents to Carry (Original + 2 Self-attested Copies):
Graduation Mark sheet / Transcript and Degree Certificate
Any publications or other relevant documents
Note: Incomplete applications or candidates failing to bring original documents will be rejected.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular employment in ICAR. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Age relaxation as per government norms (if applicable). The Institute reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of posts or cancel the recruitment. Candidates should regularly check the official ICAR-NIPB website for updates.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-NIPB is recruiting 1 Project Assistant-I post with B.Sc. qualification under a project funded by Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change. Last date for Walk-in Interview is 20 July 2026.

rows.details: B.Sc./Graduation passed in Biological Science / Biology related subjects or any relevant subject
1-2 years relevant experience in field of plants, office work coordination etc.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Emoluments
content_sections.text: Fixed Monthly Emoluments: Rs. 25,000/- (No other allowances)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be done through Walk-in Interview. Only candidates with essential qualifications will be considered. Final selection is subject to verification of original documents and performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a Walk-in Interview recruitment. No online application is required. Step-by-step Process: Download and fill the Application Form strictly in the prescribed format (available in the notification – all fields mandatory). Prepare 2 copies of the filled application form. Bring 2 self-attested photocopies of all required documents. Carry all Original Documents for verification on the date of interview. Report at LBS Building, Pusa Campus, New Delhi – 110012 by 09:30 A.M. on 20.07.2026. Candidates must be present at least 60 minutes before the interview time. List of Documents to Carry (Original + 2 Self-attested Copies): Filled Application Form + Complete CV 10th & 12th Mark sheets and Certificates Graduation Mark sheet / Transcript and Degree Certificate Post-Graduation documents (if applicable) Experience Certificates Category Certificate (SC/ST/OBC/PH) if applicable No Objection Certificate (if currently employed) Any publications or other relevant documents Note: Incomplete applications or candidates failing to bring original documents will be rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular employment in ICAR. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Age relaxation as per government norms (if applicable). The Institute reserves the right to increase/decrease the number of posts or cancel the recruitment. Candidates should regularly check the official ICAR-NIPB website for updates.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR NIPB Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ICAR NIPB Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 (One) vacancy for Project Assistant-I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant-I at ICAR NIPB?
faq.answer: Fixed emoluments of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for ICAR NIPB Project Assistant?
faq.answer: B.Sc. or Graduation in Biological Science / Biology related subjects.

faq.question: Q5. Is experience mandatory for ICAR NIPB Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Experience is desirable (1-2 years in plant-related field or coordination work).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for ICAR NIPB Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 50 years.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for ICAR NIPB Project Assistant vacancy?
faq.answer: Through Walk-in Interview only on 20.07.2026. No online form is needed.

faq.question: Q8. Is the ICAR NIPB Project Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual till the project duration (up to Feb 2028).

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for ICAR NIPB Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Original + 2 self-attested copies of all educational certificates, experience letters, application form, and CV.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any upcoming vacancies in ICAR NIPB or similar projects?
faq.answer: Candidates are advised to regularly visit the official ICAR-NIPB website as more project-based positions may be advertised in future under various ongoing projects.
